label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. The question is whether following the given instructions will bring me back to the starting point. The instructions are: "Always face forward. Take 8 steps right. Take 8 steps left." The options are Yes or No. First, I need to understand what "always face forward" means in this context. Facing forward usually means facing the same direction you were initially. So if I start facing a certain direction, I don't change that direction during the steps. Now, the next step is taking 8 steps to the right. If I'm facing forward, moving right would be to the right relative to my current facing direction. So if I'm facing north, moving right would be east. Then, taking 8 steps left would be moving west, which is the opposite of east. So if I take 8 steps right (east) and then 8 steps left (west), I would end up back at my starting position if I didn't change direction during this. But wait, the problem says "always face forward," which suggests I don't change direction. So if I'm still facing north the entire time, moving right would be east, then left would be west. So moving 8 steps east and 8 steps west would bring me back to the starting point. So the answer would be Yes. But maybe there's a trick here. Let me consider another interpretation. If I take 8 steps right, then turn around and take 8 steps left, that might not bring me back. But the instructions say "always face forward," so I don't turn around. I just keep facing the same direction. So right is always the same direction relative to my facing. For example, if I'm facing north, right is east. So 8 steps right and 8 steps left (west) would bring me back. Wait, perhaps the problem is in how "right" and "left" are defined. If I take 8 steps to the right (east) and then take 8 steps to the left (west), I would end up back at the start. So the answer is Yes. Alternatively, if "right" and "left" are relative to the direction I'm facing. Let's say I'm facing north. Then right is east and left is west. So 8 steps right and 8 steps left would bring me back.
